contemn.ex: He was accused of trying to contemn the law.

contemplate.def: 冥想、沉思、盤算、注視的人的人
contemplate.ex: She sat quietly to contemplate her future.

contemplation.def: 冥想、盤算、預期的人物 (單數)
contemplation.ex: After deep contemplation, he made a choice.

contemplative.def: 沉思的人、冥想的人的人物
contemplative.ex: He was in a very contemplative mood tonight.

contemporaneous.def: 同時代的、同時發生的人的人物
contemporaneous.ex: The two events were almost contemporaneous.

contemporary.def: 當代的、同時代的人的人物 (現)
contemporary.col: contemporary art, contemporary dance, contemporary world
contemporary.ex: He loves collecting expensive contemporary art.

contempt.col: beneath contempt (卑鄙), contempt of court (藐視法庭)
contempt.ex: His cowardly behavior is truly beneath contempt.

contemptible.ex: You are a very cruel and contemptible liar.

contemptuous.ex: She gave him a very cold and contemptuous look.

contend.def: 競爭、鬥爭、主張的人的人
contend.ex: They have to contend with many local problems.

contender.ex: He is a leading contender for the local title.

content.def: 內容、內容物、滿足的、容量的人物 (單數)
content.col: table of contents, fat content, content with
content.ex: She seems very content with her new simple life.

contented.def: 滿足了的、心安理得的人的人 (或物)
contented.ex: A contented smile appeared on her kind face.

contention.def: 爭辯、論點、競爭的人物 (單數)
contention.col: bone of contention, field of contention
contention.ex: The new park was a major bone of contention.

contentious.def: 好爭吵的、有異議的人的人物 (吵)
contentious.ex: Health care is always a very contentious issue.

contentment.ex: He has a great feeling of peace and contentment.

contents.ex: Please check the box contents very carefully.

conterminous.def: 毗連的、接壤的人的人物
conterminous.ex: The two countries are local conterminous states.

contest.def: 競賽、比賽、抗辯、爭奪的人的人人物 (單數)
contest.col: beauty contest, close contest, contest a will
contest.ex: The sisters decided to contest their uncle's will.

contestant.def: 參賽者、競爭者人物 (單數)
contestant.ex: The quiz contestant won ten thousand dollars.

contesting.def: 正在競爭的、正在抗辯的人 (或物)
contesting.ex: The two contesting parties met in the local court.

context.def: 上下文、語境、背景人物 (單數)
context.col: historical context, out of context (斷章取義)
context.ex: His remarks were taken out of their true context.

contextual.def: 上下文的人、語境的人的人物
contextual.ex: Use the contextual clues to find the meaning.

contextuality.ex: The study examined the social contextuality.

contextualize.def: 語境化、置於背景之下的人的人
contextualize.ex: It's important to contextualize the local data.

contiguity.ex: The project uses the physical contiguity of hill.

contiguous.def: 毗連的、連續的人的人物
contiguous.ex: The two farms are contiguous to each other.

continence/continency.ex: He is a man noted for his great self-continence.

continent.def: 大陸、洲、克制的、節制的人的人物 (單數)
continent.col: the Dark Continent (非洲), asian continent
continent.ex: Asia is the largest continent on the whole earth.

continental.def: 大陸的人、大洲的人的人物
continental.ex: We had a light continental breakfast in hotel.

contingency.def: 偶然性、意外事件、應急人物 (單數)
contingency.ex: We need a contingency plan for the power cut.

contingent.def: 代表團、分遣隊、視情況而定的人的人人物 (單數)
contingent.ex: The deal is contingent on his final approval.

continuance.ex: He stayed here during the continuance of war.

continuation.def: 持續、繼續、續編的人物 (單數)
continuation.ex: We hope for a quick continuation of services.

continue.def: 繼續、持續、留下來的人的人
continue.ex: The rain will likely continue on all tonight.

continued.def: 持續了的、連續的人的人 (或物)
continued.ex: We wish you every continued success in work.

continuing.def: 正在持續的、連續的人 (或物)
continuing.ex: She has enrolled in a continuing education class.
